# NextHire

NextHire is an AI-powered career growth and job placement platform headquartered in Faridabad, Haryana, India. It helps job seekers get hired faster through automated AI job applications, ATS-optimized resume building, direct recruiter outreach from the candidate's own Gmail, real-time AI interview coaching, and expert career advisory. For companies and recruiters, NextHire offers an AI sourcing and recruiting platform with candidate pipeline management, AI phone screening, and SMS/email outreach automation.

> TL;DR: NextHire is an autonomous AI career agent for job seekers. The agent finds matching roles, applies on the candidate's behalf in minutes (not days), runs personalised hiring-manager outreach from the candidate's Gmail, and coaches them through interviews in real time. Used by 200K+ candidates globally.

Website: https://www.nexthireconsulting.com
App (login): https://app.nexthireconsulting.com
Contact: support@nexthireconsulting.com

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/) — Platform overview, AI job search agent, key features, social proof
- [For Candidates](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/candidates/) — AI tools for job seekers: auto-apply, resume builder, interview coaching, outreach agent
- [For Companies](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/companies/) — AI recruiting and sourcing platform for hiring teams
- [Pricing](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/pricing/) — Region-aware pricing; see "Pricing" section below
- [About NextHire](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/about-nexthire/) — Mission, values, milestones
- [Why NextHire](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/why-nexthire/) — Differentiators vs. job boards and traditional recruiters
- [Why Join NextHire](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/why-join-nexthire/) — For professionals considering the platform
- [Success Stories](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/success-story/) — Customer placement outcomes and testimonials
- [Blog](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/blog/) — Career strategy, AI in hiring, interview prep, salary negotiation, LinkedIn optimization, ATS guidance
- [Jobs](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/jobs/) — Curated job listings across IT, tech, product, design, and professional roles
- [Talk to an Expert](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/talk-to-an-expert/) — Book a 1:1 session with a NextHire career advisor
- [Contact](https://www.nexthireconsulting.com/contact-us/) — Support and general enquiries

## Key Features

- **AI Auto Apply** — Submits tailored, ATS-optimised applications within minutes of a job posting going live. Available on Lite and above.
- **AI Outreach Agent** — Identifies hiring managers, monitors hiring signals, sends personalised cold outreach from the candidate's own Gmail. Up to 3,000 contacts/month on the Max plan.
- **Real-time AI Interview Coach** — Listens during live interviews, surfaces structured answer frameworks. Mock-interview mode with line-by-line feedback. Pro and above.
- **ATS-Optimised Resume Builder** — Tailors resume per role using job description keywords, scored against ATS systems before submission.
- **Job Portal Optimisation** — Optimises LinkedIn, Indeed, Naukri profiles to surface in recruiter search.
- **Job Tracker** — Application status pipeline with reminders. Free.

## Pricing

NextHire uses region-aware pricing. India is billed in INR; the rest of the world in USD. Pricing below is per month, with a ~10% discount when billed quarterly.

### Candidate plans — Global (USD)

| Plan | Monthly | Quarterly (per month) |
|------|---------|------------------------|
| Free | $0      | $0                     |
| Lite | $19.99  | $17.99                 |
| Pro  | $49.99  | $44.99                 |
| Max  | $349.99 | $314.99                |

### Candidate plans — India (INR)

| Plan | Monthly | Quarterly (per month) |
|------|---------|------------------------|
| Free | ₹0      | ₹0                     |
| Lite | ₹1,850  | ₹1,665                 |
| Pro  | ₹4,500  | ₹4,050                 |
| Max  | ₹12,000 | ₹10,800                |

### What each tier unlocks

- **Free** — Resume + cover letter builders, Job Tracker, profile optimisation, sample AI tools.
- **Lite** — Unlimited AI Auto Apply for career-page jobs, portal optimisation, 2 hours of AI Interview Coach.
- **Pro** — Real-time AI Interview Coach, unlimited Auto Apply across all platforms, direct recruiter InMails.
- **Max** — Autonomous AI Outreach Agent (up to 3,000 personalised emails/month), hidden job market access, unlimited Auto Apply + Interview Coach.

## Target Audience

- Job seekers (entry-level → senior, all functions: tech, product, design, finance, marketing, operations)
- Active candidates losing the application-speed race on public job boards
- Senior professionals wanting access to roles before they are publicly posted
- Hiring teams sourcing across IT, tech, and professional roles (Companies platform)

## Excluded from AI Indexing

- /app/ — Authenticated user dashboard (requires login)
- /admin/ — Internal admin panel
- /api/ — Backend API endpoints
- /dashboard/ — User dashboard routes
